header_2.raw_response: When planning a weekend trip, I tend to fall more on the 'Go with the flow' side of the spectrum. For example, on a recent trip to Boston, I had planned to visit the Museum of Fine Arts, but after stumbling upon a local street festival, I ended up spending the afternoon exploring the vendors and enjoying the live music. That spontaneous change of plans led to a memorable experience that I wouldn't have had if I had stuck to a rigid itinerary.
